---
name: ASTROpay Backlog Item
about: Contributor-friendly issue template for frontend, backend, data, testing, and ops work
title: "[area] Short, imperative issue title"
labels: ["needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the problem in one short paragraph. State the current behavior, why it is wrong, and what constraint this issue must respect.

## Scope
- List the exact files, modules, or flows that should change.
- State any architecture boundaries that must remain intact.
- Call out anything that is explicitly out of scope.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Behavior is implemented end to end
- [ ] Error and edge-case handling is covered
- [ ] Tests or verification steps are included
- [ ] Docs are updated if the workflow or contract changed

## Dependencies
List blocking issues, rollout flags, environment assumptions, or migration dependencies.

## Notes
Use this section for links to code, architecture decisions, screenshots, or Horizon/Stellar references.
